name: Venture Global, Inc.
description: Venture Global LNG is a prominent American energy company focused on the development, construction, and operation of liquefied natural gas (LNG) export facilities. Headquartered in Arlington, Virginia, the company utilizes innovative, modular liquefaction technology to provide low-cost, reliable energy solutions to global markets. Venture Global is currently advancing several major projects in Louisiana, including Calcasieu Pass, Plaquemines LNG, and the CP2 and CP3 LNG developments. By streamlining the construction process and leveraging North American natural gas resources, the company plays a critical role in meeting the increasing international demand for cleaner-burning energy.
